Catalog/Joint Replacement/LIBERTAS Hip Collared Stems with Hydroxyapatite Coating
🦿 ArthroplastyREF: MRL-LIB-001

LIBERTAS Hip Collared Stems with Hydroxyapatite Coating

LIBERTAS · Hip Stems

Hydroxyapatite coated hip stems with collared design engineered for stability and long-term fixation. Features stepped geometry to minimize shear forces and maximize compression loading while preventing subsidence through collar protection.

MaterialHydroxyapatite coated metal
Frequently Asked Questions

Hydroxyapatite coated hip stems with collared design engineered for stability and long-term fixation. Features stepped geometry to minimize shear forces and maximize compression loading while preventing subsidence through collar protection.

This product is manufactured by Maxx Orthopedics, Inc. and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the LIBERTAS Hip Collared Stems with Hydroxyapatite Coating, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The LIBERTAS Hip Collared Stems with Hydroxyapatite Coating is constructed using Hydroxyapatite coated metal, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
